# SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0
# EN: NOTE — the SPDX identifier above applies ONLY to this wrapper CMakeLists.txt file.
#     The vendored source files in this directory carry their own licenses:
#       - gl3w.h / gl3w.c (generated by gl3w_gen.py) — Public domain (Unlicense)
#       - glcorearb.h  — MIT License, Copyright 2013-2026 The Khronos Group Inc.
#       - khrplatform.h — MIT License, Copyright (c) 2008-2018 The Khronos Group Inc.
#     See each file's header for the full license text.
# PT: NOTA — o SPDX acima se aplica SOMENTE a este CMakeLists.txt wrapper.
#     Os arquivos vendorizados neste diretório têm suas próprias licenças:
#       - gl3w.h / gl3w.c (gerados por gl3w_gen.py) — Domínio público (Unlicense)
#       - glcorearb.h  — MIT License, Copyright 2013-2026 The Khronos Group Inc.
#       - khrplatform.h — MIT License, Copyright (c) 2008-2018 The Khronos Group Inc.
#     Veja o cabeçalho de cada arquivo para o texto completo da licença.
#
# EN: Vendored gl3w — pre-generated GL loader. Files were generated with
#     gl3w_gen.py against GL 4.6 spec and committed to avoid network dependency
#     at configure time.
# PT: gl3w vendorizado — loader de GL pré-gerado. Arquivos gerados com
#     gl3w_gen.py contra a spec GL 4.6 e commitados para evitar dependência
#     de rede em tempo de configure.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(gl3w LANGUAGES C)

find_package(OpenGL REQUIRED)

# EN: INTERFACE library: consumers get include paths and gl3w.c compiled in-place.
# PT: Biblioteca INTERFACE: consumidores recebem include paths e gl3w.c compilado inline.
add_library(gl3w INTERFACE)
target_sources(gl3w INTERFACE
  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/gl3w.c>)
target_include_directories(gl3w INTERFACE
  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>)
target_link_libraries(gl3w INTERFACE OpenGL::GL ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS})
